Refund Policy

Refund Policy

Last updated: May 2026 · We aim to ensure your satisfaction with every purchase.

We want you to be fully satisfied with your learning experience. This Refund Policy explains the conditions under which refunds may be granted for courses purchased through our platform.

Eligible for Refund

Requested within 7 days of purchase with less than 20% content accessed.

Not Eligible

More than 7 days passed, or more than 20% of course content accessed.

1. Refund Window

Refund requests must be submitted within 7 calendar days of your purchase date. Requests submitted after this window will not be eligible for a refund under any circumstances.

2. Content Access Threshold

A refund may only be granted if you have accessed less than 20% of the total course content. We track content completion automatically. If you have completed more than 20% of the course, you have had a substantial opportunity to evaluate the content, and the purchase is considered final.

3. Non-Refundable Situations

The following are explicitly non-refundable:

  • Purchases where more than 20% of content has been accessed
  • Requests submitted more than 7 days after purchase
  • Bundle packages after any individual course within the bundle has been significantly accessed
  • Courses purchased during promotional or discounted periods (sale prices)
  • Requests citing personal preference without a valid technical or quality concern

4. How to Request a Refund

To submit a refund request, please contact us via:

  • Our contact form with subject: "Refund Request"
  • WhatsApp: +965 6069 5570

Include your full name, email address, course name, and order date. Requests will be reviewed within 3–5 business days.

5. Refund Processing

Approved refunds will be processed back to the original payment method within 7–14 business days, depending on your bank or payment provider. We are not responsible for any delays caused by third-party payment processors.

6. Course Exchange

As an alternative to a refund, you may request an exchange for another course of equal or lesser value within the same 7-day window. Course exchanges are subject to the same content access conditions.

7. Technical Issues

If you experience persistent technical issues that prevent you from accessing purchased content and our support team is unable to resolve the issue within 48 hours, you may be eligible for a full refund regardless of the access percentage.

8. Contact

For any refund-related inquiries, please reach out through our contact form. We strive to respond to all requests within 2 business days.

Quick Summary

Request within 7 days of purchase
Less than 20% of content accessed
Processed in 7–14 days

Contact Support
